steps.title: Track the feather focus
steps.content: The text corrects a common assumption: feathered dinosaurs were not only winged dinosaurs. It then gives the wingless Yutyrannus as an example.

steps.title: Reject absent topics
steps.content: B compares dinosaur and bird feathers, C explains extinction, and D claims only one species had feathers; none matches the passage. The text is about feathers appearing on certain dinosaurs, including non-winged ones. The answer is A.
